# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  namespace: <namespace>
spec:
  selector: {}
  defaultRule: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        kind: ServiceAccount
        namespaces: ["*"]
      to:
        kind: Service
        namespaces: ["*"]
      operations: ["READ", "WRITE"]
      when:
        - key: destination.name
          operator: IN
          values: ["<namespace>/*"]
    - from:
        kind: ServiceAccount
        namespaces: ["*"]
      to:
        kind: Service
        namespaces: ["*"]
      operations: ["READ", "WRITE"]
      when:
        - key: source.name
          operator: IN
          values: ["<namespace>/*"]
    - from:
        kind: ServiceAccount
        namespaces: ["*"]
      to:
        kind: Service
        namespaces: ["*"]
      operations: ["READ", "WRITE"]
      when:
        - key: source.name
          operator: IN
          values: ["<namespace>/*"]
  mode: OPENSHIFT

Note: Replace `<namespace>` with the name of the namespace you want to configure authorization policy for.
